title: 32.5'' x 67.5'' Brown Rattan Plastic Folding Table
features: Combine comfort and style for your guests when they sit at our Brown Rattan Plastic Folding Table.
Use it indoors or outdoors, the rattan edge adds a rustic and durable look to any sitting area at your venue.
The tabletop is stain resistant and water proof so you'll go years without noticing any wear and tear.

Other must have features include a 1/2'' dia. umbrella hole that allows convenient shade to hide from all harmful UV rays, powder coated steel frame that provides extra stability and protective floor caps so that anything causing a mark are those dancing shoes.
